fix.label: Bug Fix
fix.instruction: Identify root cause, patch minimally, and include a regression guard.
fix.verify: Run only targeted checks that validate the fix path.

feature.label: Feature
feature.instruction: Implement the smallest complete vertical slice with no unrelated refactor.
feature.verify: Run focused checks and list manual validation steps.

review.label: Code Review
review.instruction: Prioritize risks, regressions, and missing tests; propose minimal corrective patches.
review.verify: Provide reproducible verification commands for each finding.

learn.label: Learn Wizard Flow
learn.instruction: Preserve the 4-step wizard behavior and Zustand state shape; avoid UI pattern drift from existing learn components.
learn.verify: Run targeted checks for step transitions, validation, and mobile/desktop layout consistency.

auth.label: Auth and Session
auth.instruction: Keep NextAuth provider behavior stable, avoid callback regressions, and preserve signin UX continuity.
auth.verify: Validate signin flow, callback handling, and session-guarded route behavior.

catalog.label: Template Catalog
catalog.instruction: Apply minimal edits that maintain IndustryCard pattern and existing catalog taxonomy conventions.
catalog.verify: Run TypeScript check focused on catalog integrity and confirm template rendering assumptions.
